pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's target Java version from 17 to 21.
Define a property for the MapStruct version to manage dependency versions centrally.
Remove the Spring Security starter and ensure the Spring Web starter is present, likely simplifying the stack or fixing a previous misconfiguration.
Add the MapStruct library as a compile-time dependency for object mapping.
Remove the Spring Security test dependency, consistent with the removal of the main security starter.
Add Flyway core dependency for database migration management.
Add the Java Validation API dependency for bean validation support.
Replace the Spring Boot Maven plugin configuration with the Maven Compiler plugin to explicitly set source/target levels and annotation processor paths.
Configure Lombok as an annotation processor in the compiler plugin to ensure proper code generation.
Configure MapStruct as an annotation processor in the compiler plugin to enable mapper generation.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Disabled Hibernate automatic schema generation to rely on external migration tools or manual schema management.
Updated the SQLite database file path to point to a specific location on the developer's desktop.
